revision.comment: [[WP:AES|←]]Created page with '<includeonly>{{Main other | <!-- -->{{#if: {{{title|}}} |<!-- -->{{#ifeq: {{#invoke:String|match|s={{{title|}}} |pattern=^<br ?/?>%s*with%s |start=1 |match=1 |plain=false |nomatch=NOMATCH |ignore_errors=true}} | NOMATCH<!-- -->|<!-- -->|[[Category:S-ttl: 'title' parameter includes the word 'with']]<!-- -->}}<!-- -->}}<!-- -->}}<!-- --></includeonly><!-- --><noinclude>{{Documentation}} </noinclude>'

revision.comment: Protected "[[Template:S-ttl/check]]": [[Wikipedia:High-risk templates|High-risk template or module]]: 228910 transclusions ([[User:MusikBot II/TemplateProtector|more info]]) ([Edit=Require template editor access] (indefinite) [Move=Require template editor access] (indefinite))

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: Fixing my edit mistake that put this category on numerous templates it did not belong on
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{Main other | <!-- -->{{#if: {{{title|}}} |<!-- -->{{#ifeq: {{#invoke:String|match|s={{{title|}}} |pattern=<br ?/?>%s*with%s |start=1 |match=1 |plain=false |nomatch=NOMATCH |ignore_errors=true}} | NOMATCH<!-- -->|<!-- -->|[[Category:S-ttl: 'title' parameter includes the word 'with']]
<!-- -->}}<!-- -->}}<!-- -->}}<!-- --></includeonly><!-- --><noinclude>{{Documentation}} </noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was 2 revisions imported from [[:wikipedia:Template:S-ttl/check]]
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{Main other | <!-- -->{{#if: {{{title|}}} |<!-- -->{{#ifeq: {{#invoke:String|match|s={{{title|}}} |pattern=<br ?/?>%s*with%s |start=1 |match=1 |plain=false |nomatch=NOMATCH |ignore_errors=true}} | NOMATCH<!-- -->|<!-- -->|[[Category:S-ttl: 'title' parameter includes the word 'with']]
<!-- -->}}<!-- -->}}<!-- -->}}<!-- --></includeonly><!-- --><noinclude>{{Documentation}} </noinclude>
